zh.lifeSummary: 當Eleanor Staverton於大約1449年出生在英國戴文斯塔福頓時，她的父親Ralph Stafferton29歲，母親Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt23歲。她於1470年與Thomas Gould在英國賀特福爾莫爾 普斯亞德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。她去世於1505年在英國英格蘭坎布利其爾坎布利其享年57歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eleanor Staverton于大约1449年出生在英国戴文斯塔福頓时，她的父亲Ralph Stafferton29岁，母亲Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt23岁。她于1470年与Thomas Gould在英国賀特福爾莫爾 普斯亞德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。她去世于1505年在英国英格兰坎布利其爾坎布利其享年57岁。

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Eleanor Staverton was born about 1449, in Staverton, Devon, England, her father, Ralph Stafferton, was 29 and her mother, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, was 23. She married Thomas Gould in 1470, in Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. She died in 1505, in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eleanor Staverton est née environ 1449, à Staverton, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Stafferton, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Thomas Gould en 1470, à Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Elle est décédée en 1505, à Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Eleanor Staverton um 1449 in Staverton, Devon, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Stafferton 29 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt 23. Sie hat 1470 in Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, England Thomas Gould geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Sie starb 1505 im Alter von 57 Jahren in Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Staverton è nata il circa 1449 nel Staverton, Devon, England, sua padre, Ralph Stafferton, aveva 29 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Thomas Gould nel 1470, nel Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1505, nel Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eleanor Stavertonが約1449年にイギリスデボンスタバートンで生まれた時，父Ralph Staffertonは29歳，母Elizabeth d'Abridgecourtは23歳であった。1470年にイギリスハートフォードシュアイアヘメル ヘンプステアドでThomas Gouldと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼女は1505年にイギリスイギリスカンブリジェシュアイアカンブリッジで57歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Eleanor Staverton(이)가 대략 1449년 영국 데폰 스타버턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Stafferton(은)는 29세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1470년 영국 허트퍼드실르 헤멀 헤프스테아드에서 Thomas Gould(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1505년 영국 잉글랜드 캄브리지실르 캄브리지에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eleanor Staverton nasceu aproximadamente 1449, em Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Stafferton, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Thomas Gould em 1470, em Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ela faleceu em 1505, em Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eleanor Staverton родилась около 1449 г. в местности ставиртон, девон, Англия, её отцу по имени Ralph Stafferton было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Thomas Gould в 1470 г. в местности хемел хемпстид, хиртфордшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Она умерла в 1505 г. в местности камбридж, камбриджешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Eleanor Staverton nació aproximadamente 1449, en Staverton, Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Stafferton, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Elizabeth d'Abridgecourt, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Thomas Gould en 1470, en Hemel Hempstead, Hertfordshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1505, en Cambridge, Cambridgeshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
